Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, actionable reference document that consolidates weeks of potential manual research into a structured file Dino can use immediately for sourcing decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields across every running campaign for scanning.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete, up-to-date coverage of all live ad copy in seconds rather than requiring someone to manually open and review each individual ad.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of collected ad copy for specific target phrases and flags each match with the exact field name and verbatim copy where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces compliance or quality issues across the entire active ad library instantly, with precise source attribution that makes follow-up action straightforward.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the specific field and exact copy where each target phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable audit report on demand, allowing the team to review and address problematic ad copy without any manual investigation work.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline is running strong with 53 total agents — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. This week we added two new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool that identifies local businesses needing warehouse or office space and sends warm intro emails for the 13140 Midway Place property, and the **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC brands. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed this week — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. The pipeline continues to grow and deliver, and we're excited about the momentum heading into the weeks ahead!
